scripts.apk: npm run apk:build && npm run apk:copy
scripts.apkLinux: npm run apkLinux:build && npm run apk:copy
scripts.apk:build: set "NODE_ENV=production" && set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.apk:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=require('./package.json'); fs.copyFileSync('android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk', `EpiTime-${pkg.version}-release.apk`); console.log(`APK copied to EpiTime-${pkg.version}-release.apk`);"
scripts.apk:rebuild: npm run apk:clean && npm run apk
